details.title: Do not use update instructions alone in the Dockerfile
alerts: Always combine 'apt-get update' with 'apt-get install|upgrade' : RUN /bin/sh -c apt-get update # buildkit

details.title: Use COPY instead of ADD in Dockerfile
Do not store credential in environment variables/files
alerts: Suspicious filename found : root/.ssh/id_rsa (You can suppress it with "-af id_rsa")
Suspicious ENV key found : API_KEY on ENV API_KEY=******* (You can suppress it with --accept-key)
Suspicious ENV key found : password on LABEL maintainer=admin@example.com password=******* (You can suppress it with --accept-key)
Suspicious ENV key found : DATABASE_PASSWORD on ENV DATABASE_PASSWORD=******* (You can suppress it with --accept-key)

details.title: Avoid sudo command
alerts: Avoid sudo in container : RUN /bin/sh -c apt-get install -y sudo ssh vim curl # buildkit

details.title: Clear apt-get caches
alerts: Use 'rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists' after 'apt-get install|update' : RUN /bin/sh -c apt-get update # buildkit
Use 'rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists' after 'apt-get install|update' : RUN /bin/sh -c apt-get install -y sudo ssh vim curl # buildkit

details.title: Create a user for the container
alerts: Last user should not be root

details.title: Add HEALTHCHECK instruction to the container image
